name: indian-property-drafting
description: Open-source Claude-compatible plugin for drafting Indian property, conveyancing, estate, and inter-vivos transfer instruments — the conveyancing and family-property side that complements indian-contracts-drafting's commercial-contracts focus. State-config-aware design — the plugin's structural skeletons are uniform across instrument types, and the applicable State Stamp Act schedule, Registration Act 1908 compulsory-registration position, Sub-Registrar office, Ready Reckoner / Market Value rates, mutation entry route, and any State-specific instrument variations are supplied by the user via a deed-config file and the relevant state-config exemplar. Drafting workflows for Gift Deed under Sections 122-129 of the Transfer of Property Act 1882, Exchange Deed under Sections 118-121 TPA, Release Deed (relinquishment of rights in immovable property), Private Trust Deed under the Indian Trusts Act 1882, Wakf Deed under the Wakf Act 1995 read with the Mussalman Wakf Validating Act 1913, Easement Deed under the Indian Easements Act 1882, Partition Deed (private partition between coparceners / co-owners outside court), Family Settlement Deed (Hindu family settlement / consent-of-heirs settlement), Registered Mortgage Deed under Section 59 TPA, and Title Investigation Report (title chain + encumbrance + marketable title opinion for due diligence). Includes the 6-agent drafting pipeline (Reader -> Format -> Drafter -> Verifier -> Refiner -> Overseer), shared property drafting base with Indian Contract Act 1872 + Transfer of Property Act 1882 + Registration Act 1908 + Indian Stamp Act 1899 + applicable State Stamp Acts + Indian Easements Act 1882 + Indian Trusts Act 1882 + Wakf Act 1995 + Hindu Succession Act 1956 + Indian Succession Act 1925 + Mussalman Personal Law (Shariat) Application Act 1937 + Suraj Lamp (2012) discipline + Section 53A TOPA agreement-to-sell discipline encoded.
